title: Singer Heavy Duty 4423 Sewing Machine
description: A powerful, high-speed sewing machine built for heavy fabrics like denim and canvas. Comes with 23 built-in stitches, automatic needle threader, and a stainless steel bedplate for smooth fabric feeding.

title: Brother Innov-is Embroidery Machine
description: Computerized embroidery machine with a large embroidery field, USB connectivity, and built-in designs. Ideal for boutiques and professional embroidery studios.

title: Juki MO-654DE Overlock Machine
description: A 2/3/4 thread overlock machine offering clean, professional seam finishing at high speed. Perfect for garment manufacturing and tailoring units.

title: Usha Janome Dream Stitch Sewing Machine
description: Compact and beginner-friendly sewing machine with 10 built-in stitch patterns, ideal for home use and small tailoring setups.

title: HSW 5G Multi-Head Embroidery Machine
description: Industrial multi-head embroidery machine with high-speed touch panel controls, suited for large-scale production units and commercial embroidery.

title: Sewing Machine Bobbins (Pack of 10)
description: Durable metal bobbins compatible with most domestic sewing machine models. Pack of 10 for uninterrupted stitching sessions.

title: Universal Sewing Machine Needles Set
description: Assorted sizes of universal sewing needles suitable for cotton, denim, silk, and knit fabrics. Compatible with most home sewing machines.

title: Adjustable Sewing Machine Table Stand
description: Sturdy foldable table stand designed for industrial and domestic sewing machines, with height adjustment and wheel locks for stability.

title: Brother XR3774 Sewing & Quilting Machine
description: Versatile machine with 37 built-in stitches, wide table for quilting projects, and automatic needle threading for effortless setup.

title: Pegasus 5-Thread Overlock Machine
description: Industrial-grade 5-thread overlock machine for high-volume garment finishing, offering exceptional durability and stitch consistency.

title: Sewing Machine Presser Foot Set (12-in-1)
description: A 12-piece presser foot kit covering zipper insertion, buttonholes, hemming, and quilting — compatible with most low-shank home machines.

title: Singer Tradition 2273 Sewing Machine
description: Reliable all-metal frame sewing machine with 23 built-in stitches, four-step buttonhole, and a free arm for cuffs and sleeves.

title: Computerized Single Head Embroidery Machine
description: Single-head computerized embroidery machine with 9-needle color changer, ideal for small-batch commercial embroidery work.

title: Sewing Machine Motor (Servo, 550W)
description: Energy-efficient servo motor replacement for industrial sewing machines, offering quiet operation and precise speed control.

title: Sewing Kit Storage Organizer Box
description: Multi-compartment storage box for threads, needles, bobbins, and small tools — keeps your workstation organized and tidy.

title: Juki DDL-8700 Industrial Straight Stitch Machine
description: High-speed, single-needle, lock-stitch industrial machine trusted by garment factories worldwide for speed and precision.

title: Portable Mini Overlock Machine
description: Compact and lightweight overlocker suited for home tailors and small alterations businesses, with easy threading and low noise.

title: Embroidery Hoop Set (5 Sizes)
description: Wooden embroidery hoop set in five common sizes, perfect for hand embroidery projects and framing finished pieces.

title: High-Speed Bobbin Winder Attachment
description: External bobbin winder attachment that speeds up bobbin preparation, compatible with most industrial and domestic machines.

title: HSW Cap Embroidery Machine
description: Specialized embroidery machine with cap-frame attachment for embroidering caps, hats, and curved surfaces with high precision.
